Parties: Lautan Suri Berhad (Main Market issuer; Co. Reg. No. 202001000000) as Purchaser and Gemilang AgroTech Sdn Bhd (Reg. No. 201601000000) as Target; arranger/financier: Bintang Nusantara Capital Sdn Bhd.
Structure: Proposed acquisition of 70% equity interest in the Target and establishment of a long-term supply and distribution alliance.
Consideration: Combination of new ordinary shares in Lautan Suri Berhad (subject to listing on Bursa Malaysia) and deferred cash; final mix, ratios, and timelines to be mutually agreed following confirmatory due diligence.
Financing: Shariah-compliant commodity murabahah/Tawarruq facility to be arranged by Bintang Nusantara Capital, with tenor, security, and profit rate to be agreed; no firm amounts are set in this draft.
Public status: The framework for this proposed investment was announced via Bursa Malaysia on 7 February 2026 (Announcement Ref: LSB-ANN-7265) and summarised in a press release dated 8 February 2026; there has been no material change since those public disclosures.
Regulatory/Disclosure: Any material variation will be subject to immediate announcement pursuant to Paragraph 9.03 of the Bursa Malaysia Main Market Listing Requirements and, where applicable, approval by shareholders and the Securities Commission Malaysia.
Conditions precedent: Shareholder approval (if required under the Listing Requirements), regulatory clearances, lender approvals, execution of definitive agreements, and completion of legal, financial, and Shariah due diligence.
Listing application: Any new shares to be issued will be submitted for listing and quotation on Bursa Malaysia; an indicative timetable will be provided in the public filing when prepared.
Earn-out and vendor financing: Commercial parameters under discussion; any definitive earn-out mechanics and vendor financing terms will be disclosed in the public announcement upon signing of binding agreements.
MNPI notice: As of this draft, the contemplated vendor financing tranche and the revised earn-out schedule have not been released on Bursa Malaysia and may constitute material non-public information for Lautan Suri Berhad under the CMSA.
Selective disclosure: No selective disclosure will be made to external parties; any briefing materials containing information beyond public filings will be withheld until an immediate announcement is made in accordance with the Listing Requirements.
Closed period: Directors and principal officers are reminded to observe Paragraph 14.08 (closed period) trading restrictions; this general reminder does not indicate a current blackout for the Company.
Public references: For background only, refer to Lautan Suri Berhad’s FY2024 quarterly results and previously lodged risk factors on Bursa LINK; the 2024 sustainability statement remains unchanged and is publicly available.
Data protection: Any processing of personal data will comply with the Personal Data Protection Act 2010; this term sheet contains only corporate information.
Identifiers/contacts: Stock identifiers are placeholders only (“XX0000000000” / “LSB”); investor enquiries may be directed to Investor Relations at ir@lautan-suri.com.my.
Miscellaneous: Non-binding and indicative; no offer or invitation to purchase securities is being made; no price-sensitive figures are included; timeline and scope may be adjusted without prejudice to previously announced information.
